paper_title: Sampling and Pollen Analytical Studies at Fazenda Santa Mônica

methods.description: Process for collecting sediment cores from the swamp at the study site using a Russian corer, which is essential for obtaining samples for further analysis.

steps.description: The Santa Mônica core was collected in 2005 using a Russian corer.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment core using Russian corer

steps.description: A 150 cm-long sediment core was collected in 50 cm sections from the deepest part of the small swamp.
steps.searchable_summary: segment sediment core into 50 cm sections

steps.description: The sections were stored in situ in split PVC tubes, wrapped in plastic and aluminium film and stored under refrigeration (+4 o C) after return from the field and before sampling.
steps.searchable_summary: store core sections in PVC tubes under refrigeration

methods.description: Procedure for dating sediment core samples using radiocarbon dating to determine the age of the core material.

steps.description: One bulk sample of 1 cm of thickness was taken for radiocarbon dating at 47 cm core depth and sent to the radiocarbon laboratory at the University of Nürnberg-Erlangen, Germany.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and send core sample for radiocarbon dating

steps.description: The radiocarbon age was calibrated using Calib 7.0.

methods.description: Analysis of pollen samples from the sediment core to determine the historical vegetation and climate conditions.

steps.description: In total 39 samples of 1 cm3 were taken for pollen analysis along the entire core: every 2 cm between depths 0 and 50 cm, every 4 cm between depths 50 and 100 cm, and two samples at 133 cm and 143 cm.
steps.searchable_summary: extract pollen samples from core at specified intervals

steps.description: In order to calculate pollen concentration a tablet of exotic Lycopodium spores was added to each sample.
steps.searchable_summary: add Lycopodium spores to pollen samples

steps.description: Pollen grains and spores were counted on pollen slides under 400x magnification.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen grains and spores under microscope

steps.description: Percentages of all taxa were calculated based on the pollen sum, which includes all pollen types.
The zonation of the pollen diagram was established by means of a CONISS analysis for stratigraphically constrained samples.
steps.searchable_summary: perform CONISS analysis for pollen zonation
